creator: kuma@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
The word 'then' in the following sentense should be 'than',
	I think.

  Sendmail has its -OMaxDaemonChildren option which tends to work much
  better then trying to use sendmail's load limiting options due to the
  load lag.

Fix: Please apply the following patch. It might be different in its
	line number because my modification has already applied to the
	original one.)
	
How-To-Repeat: 
	(nope)
